title: taraxacum hideoi
intro: Taraxacum hideoi, also known as Hideo's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its bitter compounds. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function. Taraxacum hideoi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
